variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will anyone other than Carlos Alcaraz and Jannik Sinner win a major in 2026 (men's tennis)?

variables.name: australian_open_2026_winner_other
variables.description: Whether a player other than Carlos Alcaraz or Jannik Sinner won the 2026 Australian Open (which concludes on the date of this forecast).

variables.name: alcaraz_sinner_combined_slams_missed
variables.description: The total number of 2026 Grand Slam tournaments missed due to injury, illness, or withdrawal by Alcaraz and Sinner combined.

variables.name: atp_top_10_non_duo_titles
variables.description: The total number of ATP 1000 and 500 titles won by players currently in the top 10 (excluding Alcaraz and Sinner) during the 2026 season prior to the US Open.

variables.name: novak_djokovic_retirement_status
variables.description: Whether Novak Djokovic is still active and ranked in the ATP Top 15 as of the start of Wimbledon 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Lumina oral probiotic treatment reduce the rate of cavities by at least 50% in the 4 years after application?

variables.name: published_peer_reviewed_study
variables.description: Was a peer-reviewed clinical trial or observational study specifically evaluating Lumina's efficacy published in a medical or dental journal by 2030?

variables.name: lumina_cavity_reduction_percentage
variables.description: The average percentage reduction in new cavity formation observed in Lumina users compared to a control group or baseline in the most credible study available.

variables.name: long_term_colonization_success_rate
variables.description: The percentage of users who maintain a stable population of the probiotic strain (BCS3-L1) in their mouth for at least 12 months after a single application.

variables.name: fda_or_equivalent_clearance
variables.description: Has the Lumina probiotic received formal clearance, approval, or a 'No Questions' letter regarding its health claims from the FDA or an equivalent national health authority?

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will  an attempt be made to fire Jerome Powell before the end of his term?

variables.name: official_doj_legal_opinion_issued
variables.description: Will the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) issue an official legal opinion or memorandum before May 15, 2026, explicitly stating that the President has the authority to fire the Fed Chair 'at will' or for policy disagreements?

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_delta_bps
variables.description: The net change in the target federal funds rate (upper bound) from February 1, 2026, until May 1, 2026. A failure to cut rates or an increase might trigger executive action.

variables.name: trump_public_ultimatum_count
variables.description: The number of distinct days on which Donald Trump publicly posts or states a direct ultimatum demanding Powell's resignation or immediate firing between today and May 15, 2026.

variables.name: supreme_court_injunction_stay
variables.description: If an attempt to fire Powell is made, will the Supreme Court or a federal appeals court issue a stay or preliminary injunction preventing the removal before the term expires on May 15, 2026?

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will a new multilateral security agreement involving at least three Middle East and North Africa (MENA) states (excluding Iran, Saudi Arabia, Turkey, and Israel) be publicly announced by 30 June 2026?

variables.name: joint_military_exercises_count
variables.description: The number of joint military exercises involving at least three of the specified MENA countries (excluding the four excluded states) conducted between February 2024 and June 2026.

variables.name: regional_defense_summit_declaration
variables.description: Whether a major regional summit (e.g., Arab League or GCC+) issues a formal declaration specifically calling for a new integrated defense or intelligence-sharing framework among MENA states by June 2026.

variables.name: maritime_security_task_force_participation
variables.description: The number of MENA countries (from the included list) that join or significantly expand participation in a formal maritime security initiative or task force (like the Combined Maritime Forces) by June 2026.

variables.name: us_mena_security_funding_levels
variables.description: The total US Foreign Military Financing (FMF) requested or allocated for the group of Egypt, Jordan, and the UAE for Fiscal Year 2026, as a proxy for regional security integration support.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the FDA have authorized a medical device that incorporates LLM-based functionality by 31 March 2026?

variables.name: fda_llm_guidance_finalized
variables.description: Will the FDA publish a final (non-draft) guidance document specifically addressing the use of Large Language Models or Generative AI in medical devices by December 31, 2025?

variables.name: ai_enabled_device_count
variables.description: Total number of AI/ML-enabled medical devices authorized by the FDA (De Novo or 510(k)) as of December 31, 2025.

variables.name: pccp_submissions_count
variables.description: Estimated number of marketing submissions to the FDA that include a Predetermined Change Control Plan (PCCP) for AI-enabled software by early 2026.

variables.name: clinical_decision_support_llm_trials
variables.description: Number of active or completed clinical trials registered on ClinicalTrials.gov specifically testing LLM-based clinical decision support tools for diagnostic or therapeutic use by January 1, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Russia capture Kostyantynivka by March 31?

variables.name: control_of_chasiv_yar
variables.description: Whether Russian forces have established full control over the city of Chasiv Yar, which sits on high ground and is a necessary gateway for advancing on Kostyantynivka from the east.

variables.name: distance_from_frontline
variables.description: The distance in kilometers from the nearest Russian-controlled territory (as shaded red on ISW maps) to the Kostyantynivka railroad station as of March 1, 2026.

variables.name: russian_artillery_intensity_index
variables.description: The estimated ratio of Russian to Ukrainian artillery shells fired daily in the Bakhmut-Kostyantynivka sector during February 2026, where 1.0 represents parity.

variables.name: operational_encirclement_of_kostyantynivka
variables.description: Whether Russian forces have cut off all major paved supply routes (T0504 and H20) into Kostyantynivka by March 15, 2026, creating an operational encirclement.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Pamandzi will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: feb_01_avg_temp
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Pamandzi station on 2026-02-01, which serves as the baseline for the comparison.

variables.name: february_temp_trend
variables.description: The average daily change in temperature at Pamandzi during the first week of February based on historical climatalogical data (positive indicates warming throughout the week).

variables.name: indian_ocean_dipole_index
variables.description: The value of the Indian Ocean Dipole (IOD) index in early February 2026; a positive IOD can influence precipitation and temperature patterns in the region.

variables.name: tropical_cyclone_activity_near_mayotte
variables.description: Presence of a tropical cyclone or significant low-pressure system within 500km of Mayotte between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08, which typically causes increased cloud cover and lower-than-average temperatures.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Battles' in Saudi Arabia for the 30 days before 2026-02-08 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Battles'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Battles' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Battles' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_360_day_battles
variables.description: The total number of 'Battles' recorded by ACLED in Saudi Arabia over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-01. This determines the baseline for the resolution threshold.

variables.name: yemen_saudi_border_clashes
variables.description: Total number of 'Battles' involving Houthi forces and Saudi security forces within Saudi Arabian territory in the 30 days before 2026-02-08.

variables.name: internal_security_operations
variables.description: The number of distinct armed clashes between Saudi state security forces and internal insurgents or militant cells (e.g., AQAP, IS) within Saudi Arabia during the target 30-day window.

variables.name: formal_ceasefire_collapse
variables.description: Whether any formal or de facto ceasefire between the Saudi-led coalition and Houthi forces is officially declared null or significantly violated by large-scale ground incursions during the 30 days before 2026-02-08.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-08 than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: clermont_avg_temp_feb_01
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on 2026-02-01.

variables.name: clermont_avg_temp_feb_08
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Clermont-Ferrand Auvergne Airport on 2026-02-08.

variables.name: temp_trend_early_feb
variables.description: The historical average change in daily mean temperature at Clermont-Ferrand between February 1st and February 8th based on the last 30 years of data.

variables.name: nao_index_feb_08
variables.description: The North Atlantic Oscillation (NAO) index value on 2026-02-08, which significantly influences winter temperatures in Western Europe.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the price of Brent crude oil have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: brent_crude_price_change_magnitude
variables.description: The absolute percentage change in the price of Brent crude oil between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08.

variables.name: opec_plus_production_quota_change
variables.description: Whether OPEC+ announces or implements a significant change in production quotas (greater than 500,000 barrels per day) in the week leading up to 2026-02-08.

variables.name: geopolitical_risk_index_delta
variables.description: The change in a standardized geopolitical risk index (like the Caldara and Iacoviello GPR index) between the week of Feb 1 and the week of Feb 8.

variables.name: us_crude_inventory_weekly_change
variables.description: The weekly change in U.S. commercial crude oil inventories reported by the EIA for the week ending closest to 2026-02-08.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the Chicago Board Options Exchange's Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index have increased by 2026-02-08 as compared to its value on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: wti_crude_price_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the price of WTI Crude Oil between 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08. Large price movements in either direction typically drive the OVX higher.

variables.name: ovx_initial_value
variables.description: The closing value of the CBOE Crude Oil ETF Volatility Index on 2026-02-01. Lower starting values are statistically more likely to see increases due to mean reversion.

variables.name: geopolitical_risk_escalation
variables.description: Whether a major geopolitical event (e.g., new sanctions, military conflict, or supply disruption) involving a top 5 global oil producer occurs during the week of Feb 1 to Feb 8.

variables.name: vix_index_change
variables.description: The change in the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) over the same period. Broad market volatility is highly correlated with specific commodity volatility indices like OVX.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will R Praggnanandhaa have an Elo rating on 2026-02-08 that's at least 1% higher than on 2026-02-01?

variables.name: praggnanandhaa_elo_feb_2026
variables.description: The FIDE Elo rating of R Praggnanandhaa as listed on the February 2026 official rating list (often reflected on Wikipedia).

variables.name: fide_list_update_frequency
variables.description: Does FIDE release a mid-month rating update that would be reflected on Wikipedia between February 1st and February 8th?

variables.name: tata_steel_performance_rating
variables.description: Praggnanandhaa's performance rating in the Tata Steel Chess Tournament (typically held in late January), which significantly impacts the February rating list.

variables.name: wikipedia_fide_rankings_edit_lag
variables.description: Number of days after the 1st of the month that it takes for the Wikipedia 'FIDE rankings' page to be updated with the new month's data.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will CRL's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index between the market close on 2026-02-01 and 2026-02-08, reflecting broader market sentiment.

variables.name: crl_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The difference between reported and estimated earnings per share (EPS) if Charles River Laboratories releases its Q4 2025 earnings in early February 2026.

variables.name: biotech_sector_performance
variables.description: The percentage change in the iShares Biotechnology ETF (IBB) from 2026-02-01 to 2026-02-08, representing industry-specific trends.

variables.name: crl_relative_strength_index
variables.description: The 14-day Relative Strength Index (RSI) of CRL stock as of the market close on 2026-02-01, indicating if the stock is overbought or oversold.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Elon Musk be worth more than $1 Trillion by Jan 1st, 2029?

variables.name: tesla_stock_price_usd
variables.description: The closing price of Tesla, Inc. (TSLA) common stock on the last trading day of 2028. Tesla stock is the primary driver of Musk's net worth.

variables.name: spacex_valuation_billions
variables.description: The estimated private market valuation of SpaceX as reported by major financial news outlets (e.g., Bloomberg, Reuters) by late 2028.

variables.name: musk_tesla_pay_package_status
variables.description: Whether Elon Musk's 2018 performance-based stock option pay package (or a substantially similar replacement) is legally valid and fully reflected in his net worth calculations by the end of 2028.

variables.name: x_ai_valuation_billions
variables.description: The estimated valuation of Musk's AI venture, xAI, in its most recent funding round or financial assessment prior to Jan 1st, 2029.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will XOM's market close price on 2026-02-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: brent_crude_price_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the price of Brent Crude oil between February 1, 2026, and February 8, 2026. Energy stocks like XOM are highly sensitive to underlying commodity price movements.

variables.name: sp500_index_change
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 index from February 1, 2026, to February 8, 2026, representing the broader market trend which XOM typically follows.

variables.name: xom_q4_earnings_surprise
variables.description: The difference between reported earnings per share (EPS) and analyst consensus for the Q4 2025 earnings report, typically released in late January or early February. This creates significant volatility around this period.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_hike
variables.description: Whether the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) announces an increase in the federal funds target rate during their late January/early February 2026 meeting. Higher rates can weigh on capital-intensive energy companies.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Wagner Moura win the Academy Award for Best Actor at the 2026 Academy Awards?

variables.name: moura_sag_award_win
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the Screen Actors Guild (SAG) Award for Outstanding Performance by a Male Actor in a Leading Role in 2026. The SAG Award is the most significant precursor for the acting Oscars.

variables.name: moura_bafta_win
variables.description: Whether Wagner Moura wins the BAFTA Award for Best Actor in a Leading Role in 2026. This indicates momentum from the British Academy members, many of whom are also Oscar voters.

variables.name: betting_market_implied_probability
variables.description: The implied probability of Wagner Moura winning the Oscar for Best Actor based on aggregate betting market odds (e.g., Oddschecker) one week prior to the ceremony.

variables.name: secret_agent_total_oscars
variables.description: The total number of Academy Awards won by the film 'The Secret Agent' at the 98th Academy Awards. Strong support for the film across other categories often correlates with a lead actor win.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: jnim_control_regional_capitals
variables.description: Number of Malian regional capitals (e.g., Segou, Mopti, Kayes, Gao, Timbuktu, Kidal) under JNIM control as of May 15, 2026. Taking a major city like Bamako usually requires the capture of logistical hubs first.

variables.name: russian_africa_corps_withdrawal
variables.description: Whether a significant portion (over 50%) of Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner) personnel are reported to have withdrawn from Mali or ceased combat operations in the Bamako region before June 1, 2026.

variables.name: bamako_fuel_index
variables.description: The average daily availability of fuel in Bamako during April 2026, expressed as a percentage of normal 2023 levels. A total collapse in supply is a necessary precursor to the city's fall.

variables.name: malian_government_relocation
variables.description: Whether the Malian transitional government or General Assimi Goita officially relocates the seat of government or military command from Bamako to another city (e.g., Gao or a foreign capital) due to security conditions.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the United Nations Security Council adopt a resolution related to the conflict in Sudan by 1 May 2026?

variables.name: unsc_sudan_draft_circulated
variables.description: Whether a draft resolution specifically addressing the Sudan conflict is formally circulated to all Security Council members for consideration between February 15, 2026, and April 30, 2026.

variables.name: russia_china_veto_probability
variables.description: The estimated number of vetoes cast by Russia or China on Sudan-related resolutions between February 15, 2026, and May 1, 2026.

variables.name: unit_is_mandate_renewal_due
variables.description: Whether any existing UN mandate related to Sudan (e.g., UNITAMS-related assets, Panel of Experts, or specific sanctions regimes) is scheduled for expiration or mandatory renewal between February 15, 2026, and May 1, 2026.

variables.name: sudan_ipc_famine_phase_count
variables.description: The number of regions or states in Sudan classified as IPC Phase 5 (Famine) in the most recent IPC report released prior to May 1, 2026, serving as a proxy for humanitarian pressure on the UNSC.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Israel win Eurovision 2026?

variables.name: israel_participation_confirmed
variables.description: Whether Israel is officially included in the final list of participating countries for Eurovision 2026 released by the EBU.

variables.name: betting_odds_rank
variables.description: Israel's average rank in the Eurovision 2026 betting odds aggregate (e.g., Eurovisionworld) one week before the grand final.

variables.name: televote_score_israel
variables.description: The total number of points Israel receives from the public televote in the Eurovision 2026 Grand Final, divided by 100 for scaling.

variables.name: jury_score_israel
variables.description: The total number of points Israel receives from the professional national juries in the Eurovision 2026 Grand Final, divided by 100 for scaling.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Barack Obama be arrested before July 2026?

variables.name: federal_indictment_issued
variables.description: Will a federal grand jury issue an indictment against Barack Obama for treason or related conspiracy charges before July 1, 2026?

variables.name: doj_special_counsel_active
variables.description: Is there an active Department of Justice Special Counsel specifically tasked with investigating the 2016 election 'treasonous conspiracy' allegations as of May 1, 2026?

variables.name: public_support_for_prosecution
variables.description: The percentage of Americans in a major national poll (e.g., YouGov or Gallup) who support the criminal prosecution of Barack Obama for actions taken during his presidency.

variables.name: dni_evidence_document_count
variables.description: The total number of distinct declassified documents released by the ODNI specifically cited as 'new evidence' of the alleged 2016 conspiracy by June 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Alibaba have the best AI model at the end of February 2026?

variables.name: qwen_highest_arena_score
variables.description: The highest Elo/Arena score achieved by any Alibaba/Qwen model on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard as of February 28, 2026.

variables.name: competitor_max_arena_score
variables.description: The highest Elo/Arena score achieved by any non-Alibaba model (e.g., OpenAI, Anthropic, Google) on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard as of February 28, 2026.

variables.name: qwen_top_three_status
variables.description: Whether at least one Alibaba Qwen model is ranked in the top 3 overall on the LMSYS Chatbot Arena leaderboard on February 15, 2026.

variables.name: us_gpu_export_tightening
variables.description: Whether the US government implements significantly more restrictive export controls on H20 or equivalent chips to China between February 2025 and February 2026, impacting Alibaba's compute scaling.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will there be more than ten times as many 'Protests' in Azerbaijan for the 30 days before 2026-02-22 compared to one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15?

e.g. If the forecast due date is 2024-01-01 and we have the following data:
Date,'Protests'
2023-11-11,1
2023-10-10,2
to calculate one plus the 30-day average of 'Protests' over the preceding 360 days, we’d have: 1+(1+2)/12=1.25.

In this example, for the question to resolve positively, 13 (10 x 1.25) or more 'Protests' would need to occur in the 30 days leading up to the resolution.

variables.name: historical_360d_protest_count
variables.description: The total number of 'Protests' recorded by ACLED in Azerbaijan during the 360 days preceding 2026-02-15. This determines the baseline for the threshold.

variables.name: major_election_unrest_index
variables.description: A binary indicator of whether a national election or major constitutional referendum is scheduled or occurred within 60 days of the target period, which historically triggers spikes in Azerbaijani protests.

variables.name: nagorno_karabakh_conflict_escalation
variables.description: An indicator of significant military escalation or diplomatic crisis regarding territorial integrity that could catalyze mass public demonstrations in Baku.

variables.name: target_period_protest_count
variables.description: The total number of 'Protests' recorded by ACLED in Azerbaijan for the 30 days before 2026-02-22. This is the numerator value for the comparison.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at Brest Bretagne Airport will be higher on 2026-02-22 than on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: feb_15_temp_brest
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Brest Bretagne Airport on 2026-02-15.

variables.name: feb_22_temp_brest
variables.description: The daily average temperature at Brest Bretagne Airport on 2026-02-22.

variables.name: north_atlantic_oscillation_index
variables.description: The value of the Daily North Atlantic Oscillation (NAO) index on 2026-02-22, which significantly influences winter weather patterns in Western Europe.

variables.name: brest_weekly_temp_trend
variables.description: The difference between the 30-year climatological mean temperature for February 22 and February 15 at Brest Bretagne Airport.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the euro short-term rate (volume-weighted trimmed mean), a measure of the borrowing costs of banks in the euro area, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: ecb_deposit_facility_rate_change
variables.description: The net change in the European Central Bank's Deposit Facility Rate between February 15 and February 22, 2026. This rate typically acts as a floor for the €STR.

variables.name: estr_volatility_historical_range
variables.description: The standard deviation of the daily €STR values over the 30-day period preceding February 15, 2026, indicating recent market stability.

variables.name: excess_liquidity_eurosystem
variables.description: The estimated level of excess liquidity in the Eurosystem on February 22, 2026. Higher liquidity generally exerts downward pressure on overnight rates.

variables.name: reporting_date_maintenance_period_end
variables.description: Whether either February 15 or February 22, 2026, coincides with the end of an ECB reserve maintenance period, which often triggers spikes in overnight borrowing costs.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will the market yield on US treasury securities at 3-month constant maturity, quoted on an investment basis, have increased by 2026-02-22 as compared to its value on 2026-02-15?

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change
variables.description: The net change in the effective federal funds rate (EFFR) between February 15, 2026, and February 22, 2026, which heavily influences short-term Treasury yields.

variables.name: fomc_meeting_timing
variables.description: Whether a scheduled FOMC meeting or a significant scheduled public address by the Fed Chair occurs during the 7-day period between Feb 15 and Feb 22, 2026.

variables.name: three_month_bill_auction_high_rate
variables.description: The high rate (discount rate) of the 13-week Treasury bill auction held during the week of February 15, 2026.

variables.name: cpi_monthly_surprise
variables.description: The difference between the actual Consumer Price Index (CPI) year-over-year percentage change and the consensus forecast for the data released closest to mid-February 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will Evgeniia Chikunova still hold the world record for 200m breaststroke in long course (50 metres) swimming pools on 2026-02-22?

variables.name: chikunova_is_current_holder
variables.description: Whether Evgeniia Chikunova is officially listed on Wikipedia as the current world record holder for the women's 200m breaststroke (long course) at the start of the observation window on February 15, 2026. Importance: 0.9

variables.name: fastest_competitor_time_2025
variables.description: The fastest time recorded by any swimmer other than Evgeniia Chikunova in the women's 200m breaststroke (long course) during the 2025 calendar year. Importance: 0.7

variables.name: years_since_last_wr_break
variables.description: The number of years elapsed since the women's 200m breaststroke (long course) world record was last broken or equaled, as of February 15, 2026. Importance: 0.5

variables.name: competition_in_progress
variables.description: Whether a World Aquatics-sanctioned international long course swimming competition featuring the 200m breaststroke is taking place between February 15, 2026, and February 22, 2026. Importance: 0.6

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will LVS's market close price on 2026-02-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-02-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: lvs_weekly_price_change_pct
variables.description: The percentage change in Las Vegas Sands (LVS) market close price between 2026-02-15 and 2026-02-22.

variables.name: macao_gaming_revenue_trend
variables.description: The year-on-year percentage growth rate of Macao's Gross Gaming Revenue (GGR) reported in the most recent monthly data prior to February 2026.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage return of the S&P 500 index over the same one-week period (2026-02-15 to 2026-02-22).

variables.name: lvs_earnings_surprise_q4
variables.description: The percentage difference between LVS's reported earnings per share (EPS) and the consensus analyst estimate for the fiscal quarter ending December 2025 (typically reported in Jan/Feb 2026).

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: Will Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) take control of Bamako, Mali by 1 June 2026?

variables.name: jnim_advance_koulikoro
variables.description: Whether JNIM or its affiliates establish sustained control over at least one administrative circle center in Koulikoro region (the region surrounding Bamako) by May 1, 2026.

variables.name: russian_troop_presence
variables.description: The estimated number of Russian Africa Corps (formerly Wagner) personnel stationed in Mali as of April 1, 2026. A significant decrease would signal a weakening of the junta's primary security pillar.

variables.name: bamako_fuel_index
variables.description: The average price of a liter of gasoline on the informal market in Bamako during April 2026, serving as a proxy for the effectiveness of the JNIM blockade. (Standardized to USD for comparison).

variables.name: malian_government_relocation
variables.description: Whether the Malian transitional government officially announces the temporary relocation of the seat of government or key ministries from Bamako to another city (e.g., Gao or Mopti) before June 1, 2026.

variables.name: target
variables.description: The literal answer to the main question: According to Wikipedia, will a vaccine have been developed for Heartland virus disease by 2026-02-22?

variables.name: clinical_trial_status
variables.description: Whether any vaccine candidate for Heartland virus disease has reached at least Phase I human clinical trials by January 2026.

variables.name: total_confirmed_cases
variables.description: The total number of laboratory-confirmed human cases of Heartland virus disease reported globally as of early 2026 (indicates market demand and research urgency).

variables.name: fda_fast_track_designation
variables.description: Whether any therapeutic or vaccine candidate for Heartland virus has received an FDA Fast Track or Breakthrough Therapy designation, which would accelerate development timelines.

variables.name: years_since_discovery
variables.description: The number of years since Heartland virus was first identified in humans (2009) until the forecast date; longer durations typically correlate with higher probability of vaccine progress.

variables.name: target
variables.description:
The literal answer to the main question: Will BLK's market close price on 2026-03-08 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-01?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.

variables.name: sp500_weekly_return
variables.description: The percentage change in the S&P 500 Index (SPX) from the market close on 2026-03-01 to the market close on 2026-03-08. BlackRock's stock price is highly correlated with broader market performance.

variables.name: blk_beta_realized
variables.description: The realized 1-year beta of BlackRock (BLK) relative to the S&P 500 as of early March 2026. This measures the stock's sensitivity to market movements.

variables.name: fed_funds_rate_change_expectation
variables.description: The change in the market-implied Federal Funds Rate for the next FOMC meeting as priced in early March 2026. Interest rate expectations significantly impact asset managers' valuations and AUM projections.

variables.name: vix_index_level
variables.description: The level of the CBOE Volatility Index (VIX) on 2026-03-01. High volatility environments typically correlate with downward pressure on financial sector stocks like BLK.
